subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Unto Thee be praise for having caused me to turn towards the ocean of Thy bounty and the heaven of Thy grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد بما جعلتنی مقبلا الی بحر عطائک و سماء فضلک
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
